offer: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual reconciliation of subcontractor invoices and time sheets is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 contractors with demo video
Community forums where contractors share tools
try_it: Let users try invoice and time sheet data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
